permits.description: Remodel of existing single family home to include new kitchen (first floor)primary bed bathroom(second floor) with single story bumpout at rear and re build existing front entryway. Create new entryway to basement and relocate driveway to original side of the property. Remodel existing basement (less living space)

Replace existing asphalt roof shingles with Max Dec Colonial Slate.  Remove existing roof vent dormer and install Velux 3046 manual venting skylight.  Replace siding on dormers, estimate includes repair and painting all trim above freezeboard line of home and new 5" whitle K style gutters.
permits.score_reasons: moderate cost ($33,800); keyword: gut; minor: siding; permit completed
